error.authorization_pending: Authorization is not complete yet. Finish the browser step and submit again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Codex usage endpoint.
error.exchange_failed: Could not finish Codex authentication. Request a new code and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Codex account is already configured.

init.title: OpenAI Codex Usage Options
init.description: Configure the polling interval. The integration also respects Retry-After when OpenAI returns a rate-limit response.
